visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The applicant will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Kindly refer to the documents required page to make sure you have all the supporting documents.
Please note that effective 11 June 2017 (Sunday), Ukrainian Nationals holding biometric passports do not require a Schengen visa to travel to Czech Republic for up to 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[cze > are > en > Table:Official Visit > Visa Fees 1]
Please note:
- Please be informed that the fees charged by the Embassy or VFS Global are based on the current exchange rate in local currency and may be subject to change without prior notification.
- Applicant shall be charged a service fee of AED 111.19 per application in addition to the visa fees. Fees must be paid in cash or card. All applicable taxes included.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
 Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5i3t6pvVvrOnbthtrvd2xm/30afc82cdbabc4f498094f250aa63e66/checklist-official-delegation.pdf) to know more about the documents required
                                                                    
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/cze/travel-insurance)

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit the Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
Your photograph must confirm to ICAO standards (https://www.icao.int/Security/mrtd/Downloads/Technical Reports/Annex_A-Photograph_Guidelines.pdf)..
The photograph should be:
- of standard passport photo size (35x45 mm),
- must be of a high quality,
- taken against a plain light background,
- not older than 6 months,
- showing you looking directly at the camera with your eyes open.
Please attach the photograph to the application form with glue (do not staple it).
Your face must be clearly visible for a photograph to be taken. Ensure that your hair does not cover the eyes, or wear a hat or scarf or any other item that hides the face, hair or neck
                                                                        (with the exception of religious head coverings detailed below).
- If you wear a head or neck accessory for religious reasons, clear visibility of your facial features from the bottom of your chin to the top of your forehead and both edges of your
                                                                            face must be ensured.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph provided does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
You can submit your application no earlier than six months and generally no later than 15 days before your intended journey. If you apply less than 15 days before the journey, your
                                                                        application may not be processed in time. We suggest that you plan your trip and apply for visa well in advance, as in peak seasons we may not be able to offer you an appointment
                                                                        to submit your application immediately. 
As a legal rule, a decision on a visa application is taken within 15 calendar days. This period may, in individual cases, be extended to up to 30 days and, exceptionally 60 days, if a
                                                                        more detailed examination of your application and/or additional documents are required.

## Download Form
The application form must be filled in completely and signed at the very end of the form. Any person appearing in your travel document (such as your child under the age of 15
                                                                                or wife) must complete a separate application form. The visa application form for a child under 18 must be signed by a parent or a legal guardian.
Please note: the application form must be filled in only in Czech or English language.
Schengen Visa Application Form – English 
Schengen Visa Application Form- Czech

visa_types.name: Visit To Family Or Friends
visa_types.documents_required:
For minors (under the age of 18), the application form must be signed by both parents/legal guardians. Copies of both parents’ passports are required with an NOC letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6T3FYm5zS5wIfRMRhjtZch/844be86b55edf7f32eee37dcb9873d09/parents-noc.pdf). 
If you are a family member of an EU citizen, you do not need to provide supporting documents. However, you have to prove your status of a family member of an EU citizen by providing a document confirming the identity of the EU citizen and your family relationship to him/her.

If you are a family member of an EU citizen, you do not need to provide supporting documents. However, you have to prove your status of a family member of an EU citizen by providing a
                                                                        document confirming the identity of the EU citizen and your family relationship to him/her. 
You may be asked to provide additional documentation or to come for an interview
 Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7tyAY63TttFlvYPNy7oTaf/a2fdca55c2ccbb52b7c7a1b41897c11d/Checklist-Employment-UAE-2022.pdf) to know more about the documents required

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit the Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
Your photograph must confirm to ICAO standards (https://www.icao.int/Security/mrtd/Downloads/Technical Reports/Annex_A-Photograph_Guidelines.pdf)..
The photograph should be:
- of standard passport photo size (35x45 mm),
- must be of a high quality,
- taken against a plain light background,
- not older than 6 months,
- showing you looking directly at the camera with your eyes open.
Please attach the photograph to the application form with glue (do not staple it).
Your face must be clearly visible for a photograph to be taken. Ensure that your hair does not cover the eyes, or wear a hat or scarf or any other item that hides the face, hair or neck
                                                                        (with the exception of religious head coverings detailed below).
- If you wear a head or neck accessory for religious reasons, clear visibility of your facial features from the bottom of your chin to the top of your forehead and both edges of your
                                                                            face must be ensured.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph provided does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete.

## Processing Time
You can submit your application  no earlier than six months and generally
                                  no later than 15 days before your intended journey. If you apply less than 15 days before the journey, your application may not be processed in time. We suggest that you plan your trip and apply for visa well in advance,
                                                                        as in peak seasons we may not be able to offer you an appointment to submit your application immediately. 
As a legal rule, a decision on a visa application is taken within 15 calendar days. This period may, in individual cases, be extended to up to 30 days and, exceptionally 60 days, if a
                                                                        more detailed examination of your application and/or additional documents are required.

## Download Form
The application form must be filled in completely and signed at the very end of the form. Any person appearing in your travel document (such as your child under the age of 15
                                                                                or wife) must complete a separate application form. The visa application form for a child under 18 must be signed by a parent or a legal guardian.
Please note: the application form must be filled in only in Czech or English language.

- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
 Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3Dl9NMer0ekyYZ0psEZnXj/9f504e5156bd967113d8ca91b5b86c7b/checklist-business.pdf) to know more about the documents required 
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/are/en/cze/travel-insurance)

## Photo Specifications
Applicants need to submit the Application form with the new photo format, as explained below:
Your photograph must confirm to ICAO standards (https://www.icao.int/Security/mrtd/Downloads/Technical Reports/Annex_A-Photograph_Guidelines.pdf)..
The photograph should be:
- of standard passport photo size (35x45 mm),
- must be of a high quality,
- taken against a plain light background,
- not older than 6 months,
- showing you looking directly at the camera with your eyes open.
Please attach the photograph to the application form with glue (do not staple it).
Your face must be clearly visible for a photograph to be taken. Ensure that your hair does not cover the eyes, or wear a hat or scarf or any other item that hides the face, hair or neck
                                                                        (with the exception of religious head coverings detailed below).
- If you wear a head or neck accessory for religious reasons, clear visibility of your facial features from the bottom of your chin to the top of your forehead and both edges of your
                                                                            face must be ensured.
Please follow these instructions carefully. If the photograph provided does not meet these requirements, your application will be considered incomplete.

                                                                        to submit your application immediately.

                                                                        more detailed examination of your application and/or additional documents are required.

                                                                                or wife) must complete a separate application form. The visa application form for a child under 18 must be signed by a parent or a legal guardian.
